$comment: Pre-built PA ZIP → state legislative district lookup. Built by pipeline/elected-officials/build_static_geo.py from Census 2020 ZCTA Gazetteer + Census geographies API. Re-run after redistricting (next ~2032). Schema: zips[ZIP] = {senate, house, lat, lng}.
source: U.S. Census Bureau (Gazetteer 2020 + Geographies API Current_Current)
